from speechbrain.inference.enhancement import SpectralMaskEnhancement
import torch
enh = SpectralMaskEnhancement.from_hparams(source='speechbrain/metricgan-plus-voicebank', savedir='/opt/pretrained_models/metricgan-plus-voicebank', run_opts={'device':'cuda'})
print(type(enh))
print('mods:', list(enh.mods.keys()))
for k,v in enh.mods.items():
    n = sum(p.numel() for p in v.parameters())
    print(f'  {k}: {n/1e6:.3f}M params, type={type(v).__name__}')
print('hparams keys:', list(enh.hparams.keys())[:50])
print(enh.mods['enhance_model'])
